name: Braised Steak and Green Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Lean steak, cut into 1/4 inch strips
1 large Green pepper, cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Chunks of zucchini may be used instead of green pepper.
2. Coat the steak strips with flour mixed with salt and pepper.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Brown meat on all sides, drain off any fat.
4. Add broth, tomato juice (reserving the tomato pieces for later), onion, and garlic to the meat. Cover and simmer about 1 hour until meat is tender.
5. Add tomato pieces, green pepper strips, and Worcestershire sauce. Stir-cook 4 to 5 minutes longer.
6. Serve with rice.
